title: Lemonade Inc (LMND) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: Lemonade achieved significant milestones in Q4 2024. The company reached its first cash flow positive year in 2024, a year ahead of expectations, with a positive free cash flow of $48 million. Revenue grew 29% year-over-year to $149 million, while gross profit doubled to $167 million for the full year. The company's gross loss ratio improved substantially, ending the year at 73%, which is 12 points better year-over-year, demonstrating improved underwriting performance. Customer acquisition expanded by 20% to 2.4 million customers, and enforced premium grew 26% to $944 million in Q4. Premium per customer increased 5% to $388, though annual dollar retention declined slightly to 86%. California wildfires created headwinds, with approximately $45 million in gross losses, primarily from homeowners' policies. Reinsurance coverage limited the net impact to approximately $20 million. Management outlined an ambitious growth strategy, planning to ramp up growth spending by approximately 40% year-over-year. The company targets EBITDA positivity by end of 2026, with GAAP profitability expected roughly one year later.
